nasb.text: So Solomon assigned 70,000 men to carry loads and 80,000 men to quarry stone in the mountains and 3,600 to supervise them.

esv.text: And Solomon assigned 70,000 men to bear burdens and 80,000 to quarry in the hill country, and 3,600 to oversee them.

cnv.text: 於是，所羅門選派了七萬人作挑夫，八萬人在山上鑿石，三千六百人作督工。

ccb.text: 他征用七万名搬运工、八万名在山上凿石的匠人、三千六百名监工，
